user_authorization: User invoked /pd-imu-100x-researcher with explicit instruction to iterate until T1 CCC > 0.7366, overriding results/architecture_recommendation_20260510.md guidance against new local model families. Override is documented; the audit was based on current-feature-pool families, and these slots introduce new information (phase-locked feature routing, wavelet scattering, quantile uncertainty in chain) that was not in the audit scope.
objective: Beat iter34 hybrid T1 LOOCV CCC = 0.7366 on N=93 by introducing new information or new chain-information-flow not exercised by the 16 wall data points across 8 strategy classes.

family_members: slot_A (phase-locked items 9+12 features as chain-step appended post-K500 inputs)
slot_B (wavelet-scattering features for items 11 + 13 appended post-K500)
slot_C (quantile-LGB base replacing ExtraTrees in iter34 ensemble + IQR-as-chain-feature)

per_slot_promotion_gate_loocv.comment: vs iter12-honest-n93 (~0.6554) is the canonical-floor gate. vs iter34-n93 (0.7366) is required to claim 'supersedes iter34' as new headline. A slot may pass the floor gate (publishable improvement) without superseding iter34 (would become candidate-only, footnoted).

screen_gate_5fold.rule_post_2026_05_05: Strict seed-std<0.020 floor is dropped. Gate is Δ̄≥+0.025 mean AND paired-bootstrap frac>0≥0.95 on 5-fold OOF.
screen_gate_5fold.selection_leakage_ban: Adding seeds after seeing the screen metric is selection leakage and invalidates the lockbox. Seed list is immutable from registration.

cohort.n_filter: PD only, drop subjects missing items 9-14, 15, or 18 (matches iter34/iter33-B/slot-C cohort)
cohort.comment: iter12-honest-n93 (0.6554) is the canonical floor. iter34 (0.7366) is the strongest current candidate. Both verified on this cohort definition.

seeds.rule: Seed lists are immutable from registration. No seed addition after seeing any metric on the cohort.

slot_A.name: Phase-locked items 9+12 features as chain-step appended post-K500 inputs
slot_A.hypothesis: Appending phase_locked_item9 (12 cols) and phase_locked_item12 (13 cols) features POST-K500-selection at the chain step level (so chain step for item 9 sees V2-K500 ⊕ phase_locked_item9; chain step for item 12 sees V2-K500 ⊕ phase_locked_item12_intermediate; other items see V2-K500 only) lifts T1 LOOCV CCC by ≥+0.025 vs iter34 N=93.
slot_A.mechanism_distinction_from_wall: Distinct from F36-D (chain-pool injection where features were ADDED to V2 then K500-filtered → absorbed). Distinct from F35-C (slot replacement which broke chain coupling). New routing: post-K500 dedicated columns by item; bypasses absorption while preserving chain information sharing. Memory `feedback_t1_three_missions_outcome_2026_05_08` explicitly names this as un-tested.
slot_A.leakage_concerns: Phase-locked caches manifest-clean label-free; cache scripts must be git-committed before lockbox use (current git_sha=unknown per finding line 4353). Will commit cache_phaselocked_item{9,12}.py before any slot_A run.

expected_delta_priors.screen_5fold: +0.030 to +0.060 (per slot C single-item screens: item 9 +0.382 SD, item 12 +0.543 SD)

slot_A.falsifying_signature: 5-fold Δ̄ < +0.015, OR scrambled-label null > 0.05 absolute CCC, OR canary-feature CCC > 0.05 in test fold

execution_resource_plan.loocv_if_screen_passes: remote 11-worker ProcessPool, ~17 min wall (matches iter34 wall)
execution_resource_plan.gpu_use: none (LightGBM CPU faster at N<200; reserve GPU for slot B)

slot_B.name: Wavelet scattering features for items 11 (FoG) + 13 (posture) appended post-K500
slot_B.hypothesis: Kymatio scattering coefficients (J=6, Q=8) computed on Lumbar/Forehead/Foot accelerations during gait + balance segments, projected to ~50-dim per-subject embedding via fold-local PCA on outer-train fold, appended at chain steps for items 11 and 13 only, lift T1 LOOCV CCC by ≥+0.025 vs iter34 N=93.
slot_B.mechanism_distinction_from_wall: Distinct from F14 (FoG scalar summaries — different scale of feature). Distinct from F63 MultiROCKET (random kernels, not multiscale dyadic scattering). Distinct from F-iter54 axial-only (Euler angles, not multiscale wavelet). Findings line 818 marks Kymatio J=8/Q=12 on rest segments as 'my plan' that was never executed for T1.
slot_B.leakage_concerns: Fold-local PCA only (FoldNormalizer pattern). Scattering transform is deterministic / label-free / fold-scope=global, manifest sidecar required.

expected_delta_priors.screen_5fold: +0.010 to +0.040 (multiscale gain on items 11, 13 plausible but K=500 absorption risk if wide pool)

slot_B.falsifying_signature: 5-fold Δ̄ < +0.010 across both items, OR per-item null gates fail, OR PCA fold-local rank < 0.5 of expected

execution_resource_plan.cache_extraction: remote GPU recommended (kymatio.torch on RTX 4060) for ~30-90 min wall over 793 raw 22-ch CSVs
execution_resource_plan.gpu_use: kymatio scattering only; LightGBM remains CPU

slot_C.name: Quantile-LGB chain base (q=0.1, 0.5, 0.9) replacing ExtraTrees + IQR appended as next-item chain feature
slot_C.hypothesis: Replacing iter34's ExtraTrees base with a quantile-LGB chain (LGB 'quantile' objective at q=0.5 for chain output, plus q=0.1/0.9 for IQR uncertainty), and appending IQR(q90-q10) as an input feature for downstream items in the chain, lifts T1 LOOCV CCC by ≥+0.025 vs iter34 N=93.
slot_C.mechanism_distinction_from_wall: Distinct from F35-A ordinal cum-link (cum-link encoded targets discretely; quantile-LGB preserves continuous targets and exposes per-item uncertainty). Distinct from F66/F67 variance-reduction (REPLACES base, not averages a new one). Distinct from F58 stacked-meta blender (no convex post-hoc mix). Quantile-on-target was rejected (findings line 3279); quantile-AS-base-learner-with-IQR-feature is a different mechanism.
slot_C.leakage_concerns: Quantile loss is symmetric and label-free at fit-time on outer-train residuals; IQR feature for downstream items is generated by chain step n (which already saw item n's residuals) → chain step n+1 (which will see item n+1's residuals). This is the same chain-coupling pattern iter34 already uses, with one extra feature column.

expected_delta_priors.screen_5fold: 0 to +0.025 (council's weakest-prior slot; quantile-LGB likely smooths similarly to ExtraTrees)

slot_C.falsifying_signature: 5-fold Δ̄ < +0.005, OR IQR feature shows zero importance in LGB-importance per fold, OR per-item correlation of IQR feature with residual variance < 0.1

execution_resource_plan.loocv_if_screen_passes: remote 11-worker ProcessPool, ~25 min wall (3 quantile fits per item per fold vs 1 ET fit)

mechanism_axes_covered: feature routing (slot A: post-K500 chain-step appended)
feature extraction (slot B: multiscale wavelet scattering)
model family + chain-information-flow (slot C: quantile uncertainty propagated)
diversity_check.shared_dependencies: None — slot A uses pre-built phaselocked caches; slot B builds new kymatio cache; slot C is pure model change. No two slots share a single new cache or mechanism.

stopping_rules.soft_stop_pass_and_stop: If slot A passes both gates with frac>0 ≥ 0.99 vs iter12-honest AND vs iter34, ask user before running B/C (running more slots when one has won risks family inflation).
stopping_rules.fwer_trap_warning: If slot A passes loosely but B/C both fail, do NOT declare A canonical without explicit user sign-off — report as 'candidate, gates clear under uncorrected alpha but not under FWER n=4'.

execution_protocol.sub_phase_1_slow_think: Before each slot, re-read full memory + findings + jsonl + .swarm; re-derive ceiling; verify hypothesis is orthogonal to all 16 wall data points.
execution_protocol.sub_phase_2_tri_cli_consult: Run tri_consult.sh (codex+gemini+kimi) with the slot's hypothesis + falsifying signature + wall context. 3-of-3 convergence high-signal; 2-of-3 high; 1-of-3 outlier requires its own mechanism story.
execution_protocol.sub_phase_3_design_register: Write the run script using inductive_lib only; firewall_check.py exit 0; revise this prereg with formula_sha256 (UTC-timestamped, append-only).
execution_protocol.sub_phase_4_execute: 5-fold screen first; if pass screen, run LOOCV; one run per slot, no re-runs.
execution_protocol.sub_phase_5_audit_decide: Three outcomes: PASS / FAIL-mechanism-known (close in findings.md) / FAIL-mechanism-unknown (re-consult tri-CLI, run ONE minimal probe, close).
execution_protocol.between_slots: Update findings.md, progress.md, and this prereg JSON (append-only) after every slot.

explicit_dont_retry_anchors_for_audit: F35-A ordinal cum-link / NGBoost / mord (loss family at this N)
F35-C per-item slot replacement of chain OOFs
F35-D anatomical mixture-of-experts / per-item Ridge gating
F36-D chain-pool injection (V2 ⊕ phase-locked into K500 pool)
F-iter54 item-13 axial-orientation joint pool absorption
F58 convex blends and stacked-meta blenders
F61 tail-aware sample-weighted retrain + post-hoc calibration
iter6/F19 IMU feature additions absorbed by V2 K500
Quantile-of-target / log / Box-Cox target reparameterization (findings line 3279)
next_action: User signs off on slot designs and authorization to proceed; pre-reg becomes immutable upon first slot execution.
